message:
feat(search): add reranker bridge adapter for frankensearch migration (B6 milestone)

Create reranker_bridge.rs with type conversions between local ScoredDoc/Reranker
and frankensearch RerankDocument/RerankScore, explainability tracking via
RerankExplanation, bridge metrics computation, and bidirectional adapter types.

Add RerankerDispatch enum (Disabled/Legacy/Managed) and RerankConfig to orchestrator
with effective_rerank_config() for pipeline integration. Fix FusedResult field
references in reranker.rs (source → lexical_rank/semantic_rank). Update proptest
config strategy with arb_reranker_dispatch().

Tests: 34 bridge + 14 new orchestrator B6 + 18 proptests all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
